ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Stop time of the trip */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the bike used in the trip */,
  "trip_duration" REAL /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "from_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the originating station */,
  "to_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the destination station */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Member, Casual) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in kilometers */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_to_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_from_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of bikes that can be parked at the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station */,
  "opening_hour" TEXT /* Opening hour of the station */,
  "closing_hour" TEXT /* Closing hour of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was purchased */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bike */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Member, Casual) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Technical, Service, General) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips recorded */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips in seconds */,
  "peak_time" TEXT /* Most common time for trips */,
  "most_common_station" TEXT /* Most commonly used station for trips */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered in all trips */,
  "most_common_route" TEXT /* Most commonly used route */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "issue_found" TEXT /* Issues found during maintenance */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue was resolved */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)
